# WorkspaceAnalytics <kbd>Type</kbd>

> Aggregated workspace-level analytics returned by `getWorkspaceAnalytics`.
> 
> This type is not persisted — it is computed on demand from
> the underlying Article, Comment, and WorkspaceMember tables.

**Defined in:** `procedures.zmodel`

<details>
<summary>Declaration · <code>procedures.zmodel</code></summary>

```prisma
type WorkspaceAnalytics {
    totalArticles     Int
    publishedArticles Int
    totalViews        Int
    activeMemberCount Int
}
```

</details>

<a id="fields"></a>

## 📋 Fields

> All fields defined on this entity, including inherited fields from mixins and parent models.

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Attributes | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| <a id="field-totalArticles"></a>`totalArticles` | `Int` | Yes | — | — | Total number of articles in the workspace (all statuses). |
| <a id="field-publishedArticles"></a>`publishedArticles` | `Int` | Yes | — | — | Number of currently published articles. |
| <a id="field-totalViews"></a>`totalViews` | `Int` | Yes | — | — | Sum of `viewCount` across all published articles. |
| <a id="field-activeMemberCount"></a>`activeMemberCount` | `Int` | Yes | — | — | Number of active workspace members (accepted invitation). |
